amendment.description: In the nature of a substitute.

vote.text: Amendment SA 5445 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.

action.text: Amendment SA 5445 proposed by Senator Barrasso for Senator Rounds. In the nature of a substitute.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5445 proposed by Senator Barrasso for Senator Rounds.
Senate amendment agreed to: Amendment SA 5445 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.
